case_title: TANCREDO M VENTAYEN VS. DANILO ESPANOL ET AL

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-13-2016 CONTINUED TO JAN-31-2017 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE DEC-13-2016 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, E-FILING REJECT, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF VENTAYEN, TANCREDO M AS TO DEFENDANT ESPANOL, DANILO
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED FILED BY PLAINTIFF VENTAYEN, TANCREDO M AS TO DEFENDANT ESPANOL, DANILO OEX HEARING SET FOR MAY-03-2017 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 514
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 59939696) AS TO DEFENDANT ESPANOL, DANILO
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 60066344) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VENTAYEN, TANCREDO M RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ESPANOL, DANILO $11,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,425.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $2,108.37 INTEREST, $106.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,639.77, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 60152367)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ON MAY-03-2017 DISCHARGED PER LOCAL RULE 8.9(E) WITHOUT COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT DANILO ESPANOL. NO APPEARANCES. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. (514)
